summary: Completed comprehensive testing of C2 Malware Dashboard module - X=pi by Carbi. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: All C2 Dashboard APIs are SIMULATED/MOCKED with in-memory data - no real malware operations
8 agents across 4 platforms (Windows, Linux, Android, iOS) with proper status tracking
Task execution returns simulated command outputs (screenshot, shell, gps, sms_dump, etc)
Payload builder supports 16 payloads across 4 platforms with build configuration
4 lab environments with difficulty levels (EASY, MEDIUM, HARD, EXPERT)
Audit log properly tracks all C2 operations (tasks, builds, manual entries)
Frontend properly integrates with all backend APIs via axios calls
Platform filtering works correctly on both backend and frontend
seed_data_creation: None - uses in-memory simulated agent data defined in malware_c2.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: C2 Dashboard module fully tested. All 19 API endpoints verified. Frontend UI tested for all 6 sub-tabs (Panel, Agents, CMD, Build, Labs, Audit). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_c2_dashboard.py covers all endpoints.

test_classes: TestC2Agents (5 tests) - Agent listing and platform filtering
TestC2AgentDetail (4 tests) - Agent details with available commands
TestC2Tasks (5 tests) - Task execution on agents

c2_module: GET /api/c2/dashboard - PASS (8 agents, 6 active, 2 dormant, 16 payloads)
GET /api/c2/agent/AGT-A001 - PASS (Android agent with gps, sms_dump commands)
GET /api/c2/agent/AGT-L001 - PASS (Linux agent with shell command)
POST /api/c2/agent/AGT-W001/task invalid_cmd - PASS (error: command not available)
GET /api/c2/lab/environments - PASS (4 labs with difficulty badges)

c2_dashboard_ui: Home screen C2 Dashboard card - VISIBLE
C2 Dashboard Panel tab - Stats display (8 Agents, 6 Active, 2 Dormant, 16 Payloads)
Platform buttons (WINDOWS, LINUX, ANDROID, iOS) with correct counts
C2 Server info display (IP:port, Protocol, Uptime)
Agents tab - All 8 agents listed with status badges
Platform filter buttons (ALL, WINDOWS, LINUX, ANDROID, IOS)
CMD tab - Agent selection with command list
Build tab - Payload builder with platform/type selection
Labs tab - 4 environments with difficulty badges (MEDIUM, EASY, HARD, EXPERT)
Audit tab - Audit log display with timestamps

mocked_api_note: ALL C2 Dashboard endpoints use SIMULATED/MOCKED in-memory data. No real malware or C2 operations are performed. This is for educational/audit purposes only.
